meaning: adj.[物]半导体的,有半导体特性的
examples: Nanocrystals, also known as quantum dots, are semiconducting particles with a diameter of a few millionths of a millimeter.
A transistor needs to be completely semiconducting to hold information, Tour says.
This could be done by constructing the antenna around a core of semiconducting material.
He is thus able to extract large numbers of semiconducting tubes from a mixture.
The technique only works in materials that have both piezoelectric and semiconducting properties.
